title: Extra Tracks: History Restored
description: Restores tracks that should have been added to Minecraft, but never were.
body:
This mod adds four tracks to Minecraft:

calm4 - Written by C418 for Minecraft, and even added to the files for a while, but never made playable in the game, and has since been removed from the files. Probably because the track is kind of intense.

minecraft_02_test, minecraft_03_test, and the alternate version "Mau5cave" - Also by C418 and Deadmau5, these were basically finished and were expected to be added to the game. The deal didn't go through before Microsoft bought the game, and then I guess it just kinda never happened. 

All credit to C418 and Deadmau5 for the creation of the music!

Since it just adds these tracks to the game music in general, the resource pack should work with most versions, but I've only tested it with version 1.19.2. But if you're using Fabric and 1.19.4+, I highly recommend the mod [Reactive Music by CircuitLord](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music).
